nodes.name: Sedge wren
nodes.summary: Sedge wren（Sedge wren，学名 Cistothorus stellaris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is often found in wet grasslands and meadows where it nests in the tall grasses and sedges and feeds on insects

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: During the breeding season, sedge wrens generally occupy meadows and wet grasslands. They can however live in wetter areas such as marshes and drier habitat such as dry prairies. They prefer areas with dense and tall grasses and sedges to build their nests. During winter, migratory sedge wrens can be found in a variety of habitat as long as there are sufficient insects to eat.{{cite journal|last1=Brooks | first1=Matthew E.| last2=Stouffer | first2=Philip C
